summary: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED! RightPanel 'Cannot access job before initialization' error has been successfully resolved. Completed comprehensive testing of job board functionality, Gmail integration, and navigation. Backend remains at 100% success rate. Frontend issues from previous iteration largely resolved.

ui_bugs.issue: Occasional job card display inconsistency - first created job disappeared from board while second job displayed properly
ui_bugs.details: Job creation works and saves to backend, but UI display may have refresh/state management edge cases

passed_tests: ✅ CRITICAL FIX: RightPanel opens without 'Cannot access job before initialization' error
✅ RightPanel displays all sections: Score Card, Interview Prep button, Log Email button, People section, Activity section
✅ Add Application modal works - both Paste JD and Manual Entry tabs functional
✅ Job creation via manual form (title + company) creates job on board
✅ RightPanel closes properly using close button
✅ Navigation between all pages works (Board, ATS Checker, Dashboard, Contacts)
✅ Gmail 'Connect Gmail' button visible in sidebar
✅ Interview Prep button clickable and functional
✅ People section shows correct empty state for new jobs
✅ Activity section shows job creation activity
✅ All 25 backend API endpoints working perfectly (100% success rate)
✅ Gmail API endpoints return proper errors when not connected
✅ Page loads without errors, proper authentication flow
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Investigate job card display consistency. First created job occasionally doesn't persist in UI while subsequent jobs work correctly. This appears to be a state management edge case rather than a data persistence issue since backend APIs work perfectly.
